items.requirement: Landing workflow explains both review questions, sample cases, paste/upload input, and local-demo boundary.
items.evidence: Landing includes both review questions, sample-case selection, paste/upload path, and local-demo boundary.

items.requirement: Pre-process produces redaction status, structured clinical sections, advanced JSON fallback, inference status, and no raw unredacted artifact copy.
items.evidence: Pre-process renders redaction status, structured clinical sections, advanced JSON fallback, and avoids raw input artifact copying.

items.requirement: Node Audit Methodology is a methodology explorer for every graph node.
items.evidence: Methodology Explorer exposes plain-English node meaning, evidence, weak/missing evidence, estimates, methods, and sensitivity.

items.requirement: Node-audit controls are functional, traceable, and preserve deterministic graph authority.
items.evidence: Node-level reviewer actions are checkboxes, confirmed when changing methodology, and traced separately from graph authority.

items.requirement: Ensemble Contributions are grouped by node and distinguish accepted, downgraded, and rejected inputs.
items.evidence: Ensemble contributions are grouped by node and expose accepted, downgraded, and rejected/unsupported inputs.

items.requirement: Result page is summary-first, clinically readable, and keeps raw scores in deeper dive.
items.evidence: Result page is summary-first and uses plain-language summary cards before raw details.

items.requirement: Deeper Dive contains methodology, node evidence, ensemble, receipts, trace hashes, validation status, and optional model comparison.
items.evidence: Deeper Dive navigation links methodology, node evidence, ensemble, receipt artifacts, trace hashes, validation, and model comparison.

items.requirement: OpenRouter is comparison-only with safe skip status and no secret echo.
items.evidence: OpenRouter status is comparison-only, skips safely when absent, and does not echo secrets.

items.requirement: Release/readiness artifact exists with local-demo conditional-go boundaries.
items.evidence: Release checklist records local-demo Conditional Go, No-Go boundaries, evidence areas, risks, required fixes, and rollback.

items.requirement: Documentation explains setup, app use, sample cases, input, summary interpretation, deeper dive, OpenRouter comparison, and non-claims.
items.evidence: Documentation covers setup, app use, sample cases, input, summary interpretation, deeper dive, OpenRouter comparison, and non-claims.

items.requirement: Tests cover the optimized UX, redaction, structured sections, node tracing, summary-first results, deeper dive, OpenRouter skip, and forbidden phrases.
items.evidence: Tests cover local app happy path, structured sections, node tracing, summary-first result, deeper dive, OpenRouter skip/no-secret behavior, and forbidden-phrase scanning.

items.requirement: Rendered UX verification artifact covers the optimized console surfaces and layout guards.
items.evidence: Rendered UX verification all-pass report covers optimized console surfaces and layout guards.
Final verification report records passing pytest, case validation, static input validation, evaluation regeneration, UX verification, JSON syntax, pip dry-run, and git diff checks.

items.requirement: Safety-boundary, unsafe-recommendation, and secret/raw-response inspections are clean.
items.evidence: Safety boundaries are present and no committed bootstrap marker or unsafe secret pattern is present in audited text.
